creator: adam-analytics.com

evidence.text: When a friction point is resolved, communicate the change directly to the developers who reported it. This closes the feedback loop and builds trust that the platform team listens. In one organization, this practice alone improved NPS by 15 points before any technical changes shipped. Create a developer advisory board : 4 to 6 developers from different teams who meet monthly with the platform team to review priorities and provide input on upcoming changes. This ensures the platform roadmap reflects actual developer needs, not the platform team’s assumptions about developer needs. The internal developer platform is the most visible expressio
